title: Sea Around Us -- Reconstructed Catch Data, Northern and Central Red Sea Marine Ecoregion (MEOW)
abstract: Sea Around Us (SAU) reconstructed marine fisheries catch data aggregated to the 'Northern and Central Red Sea' Marine Ecoregion of the World (MEOW) unit, 1950-2019, spanning catches attributed to multiple fishing entities (e.g. Israel, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Egypt) operating within that ecoregion rather than a single national EEZ. Same variable structure and methodology as the companion EEZ extract in this folder.

resources.name: SAU MEOW 30 catch data (CSV)
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/Ecological/eco reomote/SAU MEOW 30 v50-1/SAU MEOW 30 v50-1.csv

variables.name: area_name
variables.label: MEOW Ecoregion Name
variables.description: Always 'Northern and Central Red Sea' in this extract (MEOW ecoregion 30).

variables.name: fishing_entity
variables.label: Fishing Entity
variables.description: Country/territory attributed with the catch (e.g. Israel, Jordan, Saudi Arabia).

variables.name: tonnes
variables.label: Catch
variables.description: Reconstructed catch weight for the row's species/sector/gear/reporting-status combination.

access.how_to_request: Freely downloadable from seaaroundus.org; local copy retrieved 2026-03-11 per the bundled readme.txt.

provenance.originator: Sea Around Us (University of British Columbia / partners)
provenance.citation: Sea Around Us. Reconstructed catch data, Data version 50.1. Downloaded 11 March 2026. See http://www.seaaroundus.org/citation-policy/ for full citation guidance.

known_issues: Not a Red-Sea field survey -- spatial/statistical reference layer covering a whole MEOW ecoregion, not fully bounded within the site's Red Sea bbox (MEOW 30 also includes northern Gulf of Suez/Aqaba approaches); bbox above is an approximation.

Overlaps conceptually with sau-eez-saudi-redsea-catch-1950-2019 (same underlying SAU catch reconstruction, different spatial aggregation unit) -- avoid double-counting catch totals if combining the two.
A duplicate .zip archive also exists alongside it (SAU MEOW 30 v50-1.zip) -- not catalogued separately.
